element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Each class has distinct weapons and playstyle requiring different approach strategies
All starting characters except Demoness begin with melee weapons
Character statistics increase with experience, affecting HP and mana pools
Mana-dependent abilities vary by character class
Returns from Heretic; temporary power amplification
Environmental interaction and puzzle solving via destruction
Changes in one level affect other connected levels; non-linear progression
Stationary weapons for area control and puzzle solving
Must defeat four generals (Serpent Rider lieutenants) across themed continents
First continent and return point for final confrontation with Eidolon
Final boss; oldest and most powerful Serpent Rider; requires return to Blackmarsh cathedral
Fifth continent added in expansion; features resurrection plot of three Serpent Riders
Only class with ranged starting weapon; unique quest items and weapons

typical_relief_triggers: Hub return points allow backtracking to safe areas
Level interconnection enables exploration of alternative paths
Completion of each continental general encounter
typical_tension_triggers: Progression to new continent with new thematic enemies
General encounters at end of each continental arc
Final return to Blackmarsh for Eidolon confrontation
Destructible environment puzzles limiting resource accessibility
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Multi-act structure with four major tension peaks (general encounters) followed by hub-based relief cycles; escalates toward final boss confrontation

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hub system allows optional exploration of interconnected levels; non-linear routing through four continents suggests multiple acceptable paths
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Portal of Praevus expansion references 'secret (easte[r egg])' suggesting hidden content exists

difficulty_curve.early_game: Character selection and basic melee combat introduction with leveling system providing gradual stat growth
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Four distinct continental challenges with unique thematic enemies and environmental puzzles; each general encounter represents incremental difficulty
difficulty_curve.late_game: Return to Blackmarsh and final confrontation with Eidolon (oldest and most powerful Serpent Rider)
notable_spikes: First continental general encounter (introduction to major boss pattern)
Each subsequent continental theme shift introduces new enemy types
Final Eidolon confrontation in cathedral dominion

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiple levels interconnected within hub areas; changes in one level affect another; enables non-linear exploration and backtracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Blackmarsh hub (serves as entry point and final boss arena)

notable_level_patterns.description: Four distinct continental areas with unique visual themes (Medieval European, Mesoamerican, Egyptian, Greco-Roman), each containing a general encounter as area climax
Destructible environments and mounted weapons (catapults, ballistae) required for progression and puzzle solving
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Siege multiplayer mode utilizes these mechanics (catapults and ballistae for castle siege gameplay)

notable_level_patterns.description: Portal of Praevus adds fifth continent (Tulku, Sino-Tibetan theme) with resurrection plot distinct from main campaign
